summary.what: Added neutral recurring report baselines and attributed site artifacts
summary.why: Timbers needed lower-friction recurring outputs without importing private domain assumptions or turning the publishing layer into a second workflow engine.
summary.how: Promoted stable built-ins to report profiles, added a user-focused project-update, preserved capture-time contributors in compact projections, cleaned generated examples, and rendered optional site bylines.

notes: Kept the migration clean-room and deliberately deferred multi-repository rollups, native ADR ingestion, renderer extensions, audience navigation, and theme contracts to the broader Timbermill design pass.
